issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Text states 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', which means trash from deck, not hand. Should be a deck trash action or similar mechanism.
Rest action is mandatory in DSL but text says 'You may rest' — condition should reflect optional nature or action should have optional flag.
KO action is presented as mandatory but follows optional 'may rest' — sequencing logic unclear. If rest is declined, KO should not trigger.
